title: update install instructions for Debian, Raspbian and Ubuntu

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *lsm5*, *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
LGTM, good to merge once CI is green. Thanks bunches @lsm5
err ... I'll change the wording a bit in one of the sections...
ready to go from my side..

alright, so I notice there's a lot of `libpod-blah` packages in debian for perl POD:blahblah https://packages.debian.org/search?keywords=libpod&searchon=names&suite=stable&section=all and I don't see our libpod in there. I guess we gotta also include a line mentioning that libpod being unrelated to our libpod.

Also, podman is neither available in the package search results nor `apt-get install`-able yet on Debian Unstable via default repos. So, that needs to be changed too..
@lsm5 Are you taking another run at this? or should it be merged?

> @lsm5 Are you taking another run at this? or should it be merged?

another run coming up..
@lsm5 Needs to be rebased to fix the gating error.

> @lsm5 Needs to be rebased to fix the gating error.

ready to go..
